description: Address 3 actionable issues from semantic review: (1) Remove committed build artifact, (2) Fix duplicated useAnalytics hook headers, (3) Fix search-indexer test exclusion gap.
steps: Remove apps/quantneon/dist/tsconfig.tsbuildinfo from git tracking (already in .gitignore, just needs git rm --cached).
Fix stale 'QuantAds' header comments in useAnalytics hooks for quantedits, quantmax, quantneon, and quantube.
Create services/search-indexer/tsconfig.build.json that extends tsconfig.json with test exclusions.
Restore services/search-indexer/tsconfig.json to include test files (remove test glob exclusions).
Update build script in search-indexer/package.json to use tsconfig.build.json if applicable.
Verify pnpm typecheck and pnpm build still pass.
acceptance_criteria: apps/quantneon/dist/tsconfig.tsbuildinfo is no longer tracked by git
useAnalytics headers reference their own app names, not QuantAds
services/search-indexer/tsconfig.json includes test files for typecheck
findings: All 3 review findings addressed. (1) apps/quantneon/dist/tsconfig.tsbuildinfo was already covered by .gitignore entries (dist/ and *.tsbuildinfo) but was committed before those rules existed - removed from tracking with git rm --cached. (2) Fixed stale QuantAds header comments in quantedits, quantmax, quantneon, and quantube useAnalytics hooks. (3) Created tsconfig.build.json for search-indexer (matching ci-runner/git-server pattern), restored main tsconfig.json to include test files, and fixed resulting type errors in test files (missing isAdmin/limit/page fields and possibly-undefined index accesses).
